description_long: This is a modern L-shaped kitchen cabinet unit featuring a combination of upper and lower cabinetry with a continuous wooden countertop. The cabinetry is finished in a matte light gray, with the upper cabinets providing ample storage space above the work surface. The countertop is a light wood texture, integrating a white sink basin and a black cooktop, both flush-mounted for a sleek appearance. The lower cabinets include open shelving and closed compartments, while the tall side panel likely conceals additional storage or appliances. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible handles, emphasizing a contemporary urban aesthetic. The unit is designed to be built-in, fitting snugly against two walls to maximize corner space.
description: A modern L-shaped kitchen cabinet with matte gray cabinetry, a wooden countertop, integrated sink, and cooktop, designed for built-in corner installation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tall end panel and partial visibility of the countertop and upper cabinetry.
description_view_1: Frontal angled view revealing the full L-shaped layout, wooden countertop, integrated sink, cooktop, and both upper and lower cabinets.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the depth of the cabinetry and the continuous countertop edge.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back panels and the overall width of the unit, with minimal detail on functional surfaces.
